description_long: This object is a plush, pillow-like representation of a Bernese Mountain Dog, featuring a lifelike printed image of the breed on a soft, fabric surface. The dog is depicted standing on all four legs, with a large, rounded body and a cheerful facial expression, including a pink tongue and bright eyes. The fur pattern is realistic, with a tricolor coat of black, white, and brown, and the legs and face are detailed with characteristic markings. The object appears to be stuffed, giving it a soft and squeezable form, and the seams are visible along the edges, indicating its construction as a soft toy or cushion. There are no visible accessories such as a collar or leash, and the ears are floppy, hanging down on either side of the head. The tail is short and positioned downward, blending into the body.
description: A soft, plush Bernese Mountain Dog pillow with a realistic tricolor print and floppy ears, standing on four legs.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the dog's happy face, pink tongue, and detailed tricolor markings on the head and chest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded, plush body and the back of the legs, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the dog's expressive face, open mouth, and the full side profile of the body and legs.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the broad back, head shape, and the white chest area, with the legs partially visible.
